title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 46
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost library card.
questions.audio_script: Man: Did you find your library card? You sounded worried this morning. || Boy: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the school office, because I remembered showing it to the secretary. || Man: And did you check the computer room? You were there later. || Boy: I did, but it was not there. Then my dad called and said [1]my library card was under the kitchen table[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Man: Good. You would need it today. || Boy: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you find your library card? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the school office, because I remembered showing it to the secretary.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: And did you check the computer room? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my dad called and said my library card was under the kitchen table. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the library card?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, library card on an office desk, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, library card beside a computer keyboard, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, library card under a kitchen table, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my library card was under the kitchen table.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to have a picnic this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Man: I don't think so. The grass will be too wet, so that plan will not work. || Woman: We could meet at the café instead. || Man: I checked, but it is too crowded. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are cooking at home after school[/1]. || Woman: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Man: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still going to have a picnic this afternoon? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The grass will be too wet, so that plan will not work.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could meet at the café instead.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but it is too crowded. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are cooking at home after school.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.question: What are the friends going to do?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, friends cooking together in a kitchen, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, friends having a picnic, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says they are cooking at home after school.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the geography trip.
questions.audio_script: Man: What do we need to take for the geography trip tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Woman: The teacher said we do not need to bring a sun cream, because they have enough for everybody. || Man: What about a map? || Woman: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring strong shoes because the ground near the river is muddy[/1]. || Man: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Woman: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What do we need to take for the geography trip tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: The teacher said we do not need to bring a sun cream, because they have enough for everybody.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about a map?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: No, not this time. The important thing is this: bring strong shoes because the ground near the river is muddy.

dialogue.speaker: man

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Woman: I first thought about rice dish, but it has nuts in it. || Man: The mushroom pizza looks good too. || Woman: Maybe, but my sister chose that. I think [1]I will have the lentil soup because it is the cheapest[/1]. || Man: Good choice. I will order after you. || Woman: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: woman

dialogue.speaker: woman

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the language club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the language club today. Please do not go to the room three, because another teacher needs it. Some students may wait by the computer room, but the internet is not working. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the library after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the language club today. Please do not go to the room three, because another teacher needs it. Some students may wait by the computer room, but the internet is not working. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the library after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the shopping centre.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the shopping centre tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the train. || Man: I was, but the train is delayed. || Woman: Could you use walking instead? || Man: I checked, but it may rain before lunch. [1]I am going to take the bus because it leaves from outside school[/1]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Man: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a cinema.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What are you doing at the cinema this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to sell popcorn. || Man: Not now, because the machine is broken. || Woman: So will you take tickets? || Man: No, the film starts later. The manager said [1]my job today is to tidy seats after the film[/1]. || Woman: That sounds clear enough. || Man: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
